text:
Comment on attachment 227377
git diff

I have a patch which changes the use of our ports scons to the in-tree scons of mongodb. This is scons 3.1.2.
See the forum post of MongoDB for feedback of a MongoDB developer about this.
https://www.mongodb.com/community/forums/t/scons-4-2-0-fails-compilation/120611/2?u=r_k
They are planning to move to Scons 4.2.0 in the future.
